## Checks

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Content links checked, or the change does not touch content links
- [ ] No deployable file exceeds the 25 MB Cloudflare Pages limit
- [ ] Visual check completed, or the change does not touch layout/styles
- [ ] `npm run sysinternals:check` completed, or Sysinternals files were not touched
